---
title: "Susan Sybilla Soulsby"
---

## Susan Sybilla Soulsby

**Dates:** (1833/4-1904)

**Maiden name:** (Thompson)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1881)

### Biography

She married (1856) Percy Soulsby. [<i>The Letters of L. H. M. S. and S. S. S</i>. (1929)]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
